plan: Trim SPY to 20% to reduce concentration and meet mandate limits.
Sell all SOXL and SPAL to eliminate leveraged ETFs and remove below-stop holdings.
Increase QQQI to 25% for more income and broad index exposure.
Buy NOW at 5% as a top-quality, high-scoring new position.
This plan prioritizes capital preservation and reduces overall portfolio risk.
conservative.read: This conservative plan targets a modest ~1.5% monthly return, focusing on capital preservation. It significantly reduces risk by eliminating leveraged ETFs and lowering concentration. Expect lower volatility and drawdown potential.

plan: Trim SPY to 25% to meet concentration limits and reduce gross leverage.
Sell all SOXL and SPAL to exit below-stop positions and reduce leveraged ETF exposure to zero.
Increase QQQI to 25% for a balanced income and broad index component.
Buy ANET and NOW at 5% each to add quality tech names from the scanner.
This plan balances growth potential with prudent risk management.
balanced.read: This balanced plan aims for ~2.5% monthly growth, prioritizing risk-first growth. It reduces leverage and concentration while adding quality tech. Expect moderate volatility and drawdown potential.

moves.note: Add strong chip, high scanner score

plan: Trim SPY to 25% to meet concentration limits and free up capital.
Sell all SOXL and SPAL to exit below-stop positions and reallocate capital.
Increase CRWD to 20% to press a winning AI/Software position.
Buy TECL at 10% to add leveraged tech exposure from a strong scanner setup.
Buy ARM at 10% and NOW at 5% to add high-scoring chip and software names.
This plan aggressively targets growth by leveraging strong setups and increasing concentration.
aggressive.read: This aggressive plan targets ~4% monthly growth, leaning into leverage and concentration. It will have significantly higher volatility and drawdown potential, especially with leveraged ETFs. Daily decay and rebalancing in leveraged ETFs can erode value quickly, requiring strict stop discipline.

plan: Trim SPY to 25% to meet concentration limits and reduce gross leverage.
Trim SMH and CRWD to 5% each to reduce exposure to semiconductors and high-beta tech.
Sell all SOXL and SPAL to eliminate all leveraged ETFs from the portfolio.
Increase QQQI to 40% to maximize income and provide a stable core holding.
This plan prioritizes steady monthly distributions and low drawdown over growth.
income.read: This income plan targets ~1% monthly distributions, prioritizing yield and low drawdown. Distributions are variable and NAV can still fall in selloffs. Expect significantly lower growth potential but more stable cash flow.
